# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
spec:
  profile: default
  components:
    proxy:
      adminPort: 15000
  values:
    global:
      tracing:
        sampleRate: 0.5
  telemetry:
    v2:
      sampling:
        enabled: true
  meshConfig:
    xdsConfig:
      clusterName: local
      accessLogEncoding: LOGSTASH
  policy:
    enforcement: disabled
  settings:
    externalIpAddresses:
      - '169.254.1.1' # do not use this IP in production!
  values:
    kiali:
      enabled: true
    prometheus:
      enabled: true

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: istio-pilot-admin
spec:
  selector:
    app: istio-pilot
  ports:
    - name: admin
      port: 15000
      targetPort: 15000
  type: ClusterIP

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: istio-ingress
spec:
  rules:
    - host: kiali.istio.local
      http:
        paths:
          - path: / grafana
            backend:
              serviceName: istio-ingressgateway
              servicePort: http2

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cluster-admin

---

apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: cluster-admin
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: cluster-admin
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: cluster-admin
    namespace: istio-system

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-external-access-log
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: productpage
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: HTTP_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      proxy:
        protocol: HTTP
    set:
      filterChains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.http.router
              typedConfig:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.http.router.v2.RouterConfig
          filterChainMatch:
            upstream:
              serviceName: httpbin.default.svc.cluster.local
---
